raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX XXXX was tenant in my household, and I found my credit statements in his possession on XX/XX/year>. It was a Home Depot statement, and I was unable to review the statement. He also used my Macy 's XXXX XXXX card and moved items that were purchased to another address. He has taken items to another address at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, New York. He also had his associate XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) remove XXXX large tubs of paint from my front yard after I questioned him about using my Home Depot credit card. I did not question XXXX about this matter. He was instructed by XXXX XXXX to load them in his pickup truck whereupon they were transported to a location in New Jersey. I called the police because I told XXXX XXXX that he could no longer reside in this home. I have filed complaints on various charges that are on my online statements although I used paper statements with Home Depot.
